enemy.name: Ionic Construct
enemy.weakness: The Flux Essence Core's ionic resonance

pickup.name: Gravity Anchor
pickup.effect: Stabilizes aim and negates zero-gravity effects

encounters.trigger: Extracting energy from the Construct powers the bridge to the Event Horizon

pickup.name: Starheart Fragment
pickup.effect: Grants celestial vision

encounters.trigger: Banishment of the Wraith activates the gateway to the Starheart

boss.name: Nebula Monarch
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Starheart Fragment to cleanse the Monarch's corruption

normalized.objective: Reignite the dying celestial hearth at the edge of the galaxy
normalized.reward: Ascension to the Celestial Guardian rank

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone stabilizes the path to the Void Spire.

pickup.name: Phase Capacitor
pickup.effect: Allows the user to bypass spectral shields.

encounters.hazard: Gravity wells that pull the player into freezing cosmic winds.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Architect unlocks the seal to the Celestial Core.

pickup.name: Solar Battery
pickup.effect: Infuses mechanical devices with concentrated starlight.

encounters.hazard: Floor tiles that vanish into an infinite void every 5 seconds.

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel's collapse triggers the activation of the final boss arena.

pickup.name: Gravity Anchor
pickup.effect: Prevents being thrown by massive force effects.

encounters.hazard: Explosive comet fragments falling from the ceiling.

output.objective: Deactivate the corrupted stellar engine before the nebula collapses into a black hole.

boss.name: Eclipse Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Anchor the Sovereign to the physical plane while its shield is down.

output.setting: A decaying, abandoned space station drifting inside the Eye of a dying star.
output.reward: The Core Logic Key, capable of rebooting the star system.

pickup.name: Magnetic Pulse Emitter
pickup.effect: Stuns mechanical enemies for 3 seconds.

encounters.trigger: Accessing the navigation terminal alerts the sector guard.

pickup.name: Star-Core Battery
pickup.effect: Charges the Plasma Wrench for critical damage.

encounters.trigger: Overloading the core summons the final celestial guardian.

pickup.name: Refraction Prism
pickup.effect: Deflects boss lasers.

output.objective: Repair the celestial drive before the station collapses.

boss.name: Solar Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Redirect the Overlord's laser attack using the prism to overload its shielding.

output.reward: The ability to pilot the starship and escape the collapsing nebula.
